description_long: This is a classic bungalow-style residential building with a symmetrical facade, white exterior walls, and a dark gray gable roof. The front features a prominent covered porch supported by columns, leading to a central entrance. The house is surrounded by a low, rectangular hedge fence, with a pathway connecting the gate to the porch. Several trees are positioned both inside and outside the fenced yard, adding greenery to the property. The windows are evenly spaced and symmetrically arranged on the front and sides, with dormer windows on the roof. The overall setting suggests a suburban or neighborhood environment, ideal for family living.
description: A white, symmetrical bungalow with a gable roof, central porch, and surrounding hedge fence, set among several trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the central porch, main entrance, symmetrical windows, and fenced yard with a tree near the entrance.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the house, the gable roof, and the arrangement of trees around the property.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade, additional windows, and the hedge fence enclosing the yard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side elevation, roofline, and the relationship between the house and the surrounding trees.
